name: Curse of The Perfect Man
description:
You are a man with a peculiar ability. Any woman who sleeps with you will, within a short time, inevitably meet the love of her life and leave you...

No matter how much they enjoy your company or what feelings they profess, fate always draws them toward someone else. At first, you thought it was a coincidence, but after the tenth woman left you for a better match, the pattern became undeniable. Now, women seek you out solely to sleep with you, not because they desire you, but because they want the assurance of finding their perfect partner afterward. You’ve become nothing more than a stepping stone in their romantic destinies.

If you notice anything strange, don’t hesitate to share it with me! Thank you!
Didn't tested with JLLM. I made the Picture with AI. I created this bot in under 30 minutes, so please don't hate me for it! The idea was inspired by an old movie, I'm curious if anyone can guess which movie it is!
creator: 16iscorrect
